theme_and_archetype.rationale: Move away from the generic Navy Blue + Gold and AI purple. Construction requires trust, precision, and physical energy. We use a brutalist, high-contrast structural grayscale paired with a vibrant 'Safety Orange' to evoke industrial strength, speed (4-6 hour delivery), and scale.

logo_concept.wordmark: Heavy, bold sans-serif (Cabinet Grotesk Black). Tracking should be tight.
logo_concept.icon_idea: A monolithic, isometric geometric block resembling a steel girder intersecting a concrete pillar, forming an abstract 'I' and 'S'.
logo_concept.svg_structure: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='20' y='20' width='25' height='60' fill='#0A0A0A'/><path d='M55 20h25v20H55zM55 60h25v20H55z' fill='#FF4500'/></svg>
logo_concept.instructions: Use this SVG inline next to the text 'INFRA STORES'. Match the color scheme.

color_palette.description: Primary is 'Safety Orange' (#FF4500). Base is stark white and deep carbon black (#0A0A0A) for absolute clarity. Borders are rigid and thin.

scale_rules.overline: text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-primary font-mono

typography.instructions: Do NOT use Inter or Barlow Condensed. Import Cabinet Grotesk (via Fontshare) and IBM Plex Sans/JetBrains Mono (via Google Fonts).

global_rules.spacing: Use generous padding. Sections should have py-24. Containers must have max-w-7xl.
global_rules.borders: Use sharp edges (rounded-none). All cards and catalog items should have a 1px solid border (border-border).
global_rules.shadows: Replace soft drop shadows with hard, brutalist shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)]) on hover for buttons and cards.

specific_sections.homepage_hero: Split layout or bento grid prioritizing 'Materials' and 'Construction'. Overlay text on industrial imagery with a heavy gradient to maintain contrast. Ensure 4-6 hour delivery is highlighted.
specific_sections.materials_catalog: Sidebar for 21 category filter pills. Grid layout (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) for 150+ product cards. Product cards must show image, brand, price, and a full-width 'Request Quote' + WhatsApp button.
specific_sections.brand_directory: Instead of messy 200+ logo images, use pure CSS styled text tiles. A grid of uniform rectangular tiles with bold centered text for each brand name. Grouped A-Z.
specific_sections.founders_team: Bento Grid Mode A ('Tetris' Grid). 3 portrait photos. Use col-span-4 row-span-2 for each portrait on large screens, creating a staggered, asymmetric layout. Do not center them in boring circles. Use tall, sharp rectangles.
specific_sections.properties_tab: CRITICAL: Remove the properties tab and all references to properties from the entire application.

rules.entrance: Staggered upward fade for catalog grids and brand tiles. Use initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ staggerChildren: 0.1 }}.
rules.scroll_reveals: Sections must fade and slide up as they enter the viewport using whileInView.
rules.hover_micro_interactions: Cards: Subtle scale-up of the image (scale-105), border changes from gray to Safety Orange. Buttons: Background shifts from Safety Orange to Carbon Black with a hard translation (e.g., -translate-y-1) and hard shadow.
rules.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a 'Living Texture' ticker of the 200+ brand names running continuously in the background or as a section divider, using the overline mono typography.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners. High contrast. Primary button: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white transition-all.
components_strategy.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border. No shadow by default. Hover reveals the hard shadow.
components_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (sharp/regular weight) for a technical, engineered look.

hero_backgrounds.description: Large scale modern construction site with crane

materials.description: Concrete blocks on shovel for material cards
Bricks being worked on for material cards

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new colors and sharp border radius (0rem).
Replace the global CSS variables with the ones provided in this JSON.
Remove 'Properties' vertical/tab entirely from the Navigation, Footer, and routing.
Implement the 'INFRA STORES' SVG wordmark/icon in the Header and Footer.

Refactor the Materials catalog to use grid layouts, apply the categorized placeholder stock images to broken products, and style the 200+ brands directory as clean text tiles (A-Z) instead of image logos.
Build the Founder team section using the 3 provided founder portraits in a staggered, asymmetric layout.
Wrap catalog lists and page sections in Framer Motion 'motion.div' elements for staggered entrances and scroll reveals.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Install 'framer-motion', '@phosphor-icons/react', and 'react-fast-marquee' using yarn if not already present.
Ensure the codebase uses .js files, not .tsx files.
